title: Operational Proof, Hardening, and Release Candidate
description: Run repeated governed adaptive loops across human and nonhuman subjects, complete an explicitly approved external publication feedback cycle, execute chaos and recovery drills, close release-blocking risks, and produce a versioned release candidate with rollback and operating documentation.
acceptance_criteria: Two or more complete adaptive loops run across distinct subject classes with reconstructable receipts
Publication 000001 or an equivalent explicitly approved external cycle produces publication, feedback, transition, and model-use evidence
Injected failures recover without duplicate, unexplained, or partially authoritative state
Security, privacy, behavior, portability, migration, recovery, and performance release gates pass
Threat model, known limitations, operational runbooks, rollback plan, release notes, versioned artifacts, and explicit release decision exist
